title: In her first campaign ad, Harris touts freedom and slams Trump
shortDescription: In her first presidential campaign ad, Kamala Harris attacks Trump for seeking chaos and emphasizes she will defend American freedom if elected.

title: Kamala Harris has Gen Z appeal with young voters. Here’s why.
shortDescription: Young voters will be a key voting bloc in 2024 and early signs show they are jazzed about Kamala Harris.

title: Harris under pressure on border security in White House bid
shortDescription: While courting Hispanic leaders at a BBQ, Kamala Harris will be under pressure to spell out positions on border security and immigration.

title: Israeli's Netanyahu finally gets his White House invitation
shortDescription: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu is finally getting a White House meeting with President Joe Biden. He'll also meet with VP Kamala Harris.

title: Iowa made it harder to request an absentee ballot. Many gave up
shortDescription: Iowa is one of 10 states that have made it harder to get an absentee ballot after Trump's 2020 election lies. The result is some people can't vote.

title: Biden's farewell: A legacy left to Kamala Harris
shortDescription: The president vowed a strong finish during his final six months in the White House. But history says that will be hard to do.

title: Biden explains why he won't run for re-election
shortDescription: President Joe Biden tells voters he won't run for re-election but urges Americans to protect democracy at the polls.

title: No more 'nice:' Donald Trump launches all-out attack on Kamala Harris
shortDescription: In addition to new attacks on Harris, Trump's re-tooled stump speech featured criticism of Joe Biden and more talk of his near-assassination

title: Biden addresses nation after quitting race
shortDescription: President Joe Biden addressed the nation on July 24, 2024, for the first time since deciding to drop out of the 2024 presidential race.

title: Joe Biden: 'The defense of democracy is more important than any title'
shortDescription: President Joe Biden's primetime address from the Oval Office marked his first public remarks since ending his campaign for a second term.

title: Israeli prime minister gives Congressional address
shortDescription: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu defended Israel's position against Hamas and Iran during speech to Congress.

title: Democrats tee up Harris nomination vote ahead of convention
shortDescription: Kamala Harris is on track to officially become the Democratic presidential nominee as soon as next week via a virtual roll call vote.

title: Trump said disabled Americans 'should just die,' nephew claims in book
shortDescription: In his new memoir, Donald Trump's nephew alleges the former president said Americans with disabilities "should just die."

title: Elon Musk denies report about $45 million Trump donation: 'Not true'
shortDescription: Tesla and SpaceX CEO Elon Musk says he is not donating $45 million a month to former president Donald Trump's campaign, despite a report.

title: OnPolitics: How will Trump play offense and defense against Harris?
shortDescription: Donald Trump may want to stay on the attack against newly minted opponent Kamala Harris – but he will also have to play plenty of defense too.

title: Netanyahu calls out Democratic critics and protesters in speech to Congress
shortDescription: Israel Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu spoke to a divided Congress as his support among some Democrats falters.
